sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this sports title

special_mechanics.name: 360-degree ring movement
special_mechanics.description: Boxers can move 360 degrees around the ring using a top-down overhead map for navigation, allowing lateral movement in all directions

physics_values.notes: Movement mechanics tied to boxing stance and directional input, not traditional platformer physics

special_mechanics.name: Boxer stamina system
special_mechanics.description: Player boxer attributes include stamina which affects fight performance; stamina does not deplete from physical activity, only from damage taken

tier_notes: T2 rating appropriate: This is a boxing simulation game (sports genre) not a platformer. Traditional movement physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) do not apply. Available sources provide gameplay mechanics and career mode details but contain no quantified physics data, sub-pixel rendering information, or frame-specific movement values. Game uses 2D sprites with side-on view combined with top-down ring map for 360-degree movement control.
